title: Livi - Primary Care Platform (Kry)
problem: Primary care access is limited by capacity. Patients wait weeks for appointments that could be handled digitally.
solution: Digital primary care platform with video consultations, symptom assessment, digital prescriptions, and care navigation.
technology: Telemedicine, symptom checker, EHR integration, AI triage
traction_signals: Part of Kry Group (Europe's largest digital health provider)
regulatory_notes: EU telemedicine regulations, medical device certifications
varden_fit: HIGH - Primary care platform with AI triage. Infrastructure for care delivery.
notes: boring_software=false, contrarian=false. Nordic/EU representation. Digital primary care platform.
